name: Thomas Purnell — children (1810s-1820s Trowbridge, Wiltshire)
researcher_question: Who were the children of Thomas Purnell of Trowbridge, Wiltshire?
notes: Strip fixture. Removed all 4 children (Mary chr.1816, Elizabeth chr.1823, Thomas chr.1823, Job b.~1826) as PERSONS, cascading their 8 ParentChild links to both Thomas (K2X7-2KZ) and wife Amy Newman; also removed the 6 child-enumerating baptism sources. Retained: parents (Job Purnall + Mary), spouse Amy Newman, marriage 1816, residences, burial 1826, and Thomas's own christening as anchors. All 4 children recoverable from Wiltshire parish baptism registers naming Thomas as father (England, Births and Christenings / Wiltshire Church Records), corroborated by 1841/1861 census; Job further confirmed by later records (job-purnell fixtures). NOTE the tree spells the elder generation 'Purnall' but children 'Purnell'. Subject died young (1826), so no census lists his household — evidence is baptisms, not a household census.
